zh.Of, Glenay, Deux-Sevres, France: 法國波特-哈倫斯多武-瑟艾福雷斯格萊尼
zh.Meulan-en-Yvelines, Seine-et-Oise, Franc: 法國瑟-吉瓦姆奧藍--易維林斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume de Meulan, Seigneur des Mureaux於大約1195年出生在法國波特-哈倫斯多武-瑟艾福雷斯格萊尼時，他的父親Roger de Beaumont, Sgr de Meulan et de la Queue-en-Brie47歲，母親Elisabeth d'Aubergenville32歲。他和Ide de Formeville至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1230年6月之前。

zh-hans.Of, Glenay, Deux-Sevres, France: 法国波特-哈倫斯多武-瑟艾福雷斯格萊尼
zh-hans.Meulan-en-Yvelines, Seine-et-Oise, Franc: 法国瑟-吉瓦姆奧藍--易維林斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guillaume de Meulan, Seigneur des Mureaux于大约1195年出生在法国波特-哈倫斯多武-瑟艾福雷斯格萊尼时，他的父亲Roger de Beaumont, Sgr de Meulan et de la Queue-en-Brie47岁，母亲Elisabeth d'Aubergenville32岁。他和Ide de Formeville至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1230年6月之前。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Meulan,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Galician (Merlán): habitational name from any of the seven places called Merlán in Galicia (Spain), from the ancient Germanic personal name Merila.

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume de Meulan, Seigneur des Mureaux was born about 1195, in Glénay, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, France, his father, Roger de Beaumont, Sgr de Meulan et de la Queue-en-Brie, was 47 and his mother, Elisabeth d'Aubergenville, was 32. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Ide de Formeville. He died before June 1230.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume de Meulan, Seigneur des Mureaux est né environ 1195, à Glénay, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, France, son père, Roger de Beaumont, Sgr de Meulan et de la Queue-en-Brie, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth d'Aubergenville, avait 32 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Ide de Formeville. Il est décédé avant juin 1230.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume de Meulan, Seigneur des Mureaux um 1195 in Glénay, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger de Beaumont, Sgr de Meulan et de la Queue-en-Brie 47 und seine Mutter Elisabeth d'Aubergenville 32. Er hatte mit Ide de Formeville mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor Juni 1230.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume de Meulan, Seigneur des Mureaux è nato il circa 1195 nel Glénay, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, il suo padre, Roger de Beaumont, Sgr de Meulan et de la Queue-en-Brie, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Elisabeth d'Aubergenville, aveva 32 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Ide de Formeville. Morì prima del giugno 1230.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume de Meulan, Seigneur des Mureauxが約1195年にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツデウクス-スevレスグルeナイで生まれた時，父Roger de Beaumont, Sgr de Meulan et de la Queue-en-Brieは47歳，母Elisabeth d'Aubergenvilleは32歳であった。彼はIde de Formevilleとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1230年6月以前に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume de Meulan, Seigneur des Mureaux(이)가 대략 1195년 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 데우스-스e브레스 그e나이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Beaumont, Sgr de Meulan et de la Queue-en-Brie(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Elisabeth d'Aubergenville(은)는 32세였다. 그는 Ide de Formeville(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1230년 6월 이전 사망했다.

mn.Abt 1195–before June 1230: ойролцоогоор 1195 он–1230 оны Зургаадугаар сараас өмнө

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume de Meulan, Seigneur des Mureaux nasceu aproximadamente 1195, em Glénay, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, França, seu pai, Roger de Beaumont, Sgr de Meulan et de la Queue-en-Brie, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth d'Aubergenville, tinha 32 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Ide de Formeville. Ele faleceu antes junho de 1230.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume de Meulan, Seigneur des Mureaux родился около 1195 г. в местности глeнеи, деукс-сeвресь, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Roger de Beaumont, Sgr de Meulan et de la Queue-en-Brie было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth d'Aubergenville, 32. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Ide de Formeville. Он умер перед июнь 1230 г.

sm.Abt 1195–before June 1230: e tusa o le 1195–a'e le'I oo le Iuni 1230

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillaume de Meulan, Seigneur des Mureaux nació aproximadamente 1195, en Glénay, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, su papá, Roger de Beaumont, Sgr de Meulan et de la Queue-en-Brie, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Elisabeth d'Aubergenville, tenía 32 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Ide de Formeville. Murió antes de junio de 1230.
